zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat於1342年出生在蘇格蘭費伏洛哈爾斯時，她的父親Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum,22歲，母親Margaret Wemyss22歲。她於1371年與Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1380年在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat于1342年出生在苏格兰費伏洛哈爾斯时，她的父亲Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum,22岁，母亲Margaret Wemyss22岁。她于1371年与Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat在苏格兰音巴內-爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1380年在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wemyss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Wemyss in Fife, traditionally pronounced ‘weems’. The placename is from Gaelic uaimh ‘cave’ + the placename forming suffix –es. The surname reached Ireland in the 14th century, see Wims .

variants.name: Wims
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  , representing the usual pronunciation of that Scottish name.

variants.name: Weems
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Wemyss  , reflecting the usual pronunciation of that name.

History: David Weems (Wemyss) emigrated from Scotland to Herring Bay, Anne Arundel County, MD, some time before 1722. Mason Locke Weems, born near Herring Bay in 1759, was a clergyman who wrote a biography of George Washington, in which the first account of the cherry-tree story appeared.

variants.name: Wymbs
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  . Compare   Wims  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat was born in 1342, in Leuchars, Fife, Scotland, her father, Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum,, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Wemyss, was 22. She married Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat in 1371, in Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1380, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat est née en 1342, à Leuchars, Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum,, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wemyss, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat en 1371, à Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat 1342 in Leuchars, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret Wemyss 22. Sie hat 1371 in Inverness-shire, Scotland Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat è nata il nel 1342 nel Leuchars, Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum,, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret Wemyss, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat nel 1371, nel Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1380, nel Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovatが1342年にスコットランドフィフレウチャーズで生まれた時，父Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum,は22歳，母Margaret Wemyssは22歳であった。1371年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアでHugh Fraser 4th of Lovatと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1380年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat(이)가 1342년 스컷랜드 피프 레우처스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum,(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Wemyss(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1371년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat nasceu em 1342, em Leuchars, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum,, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wemyss, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat em 1371, em Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1380, em Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat родилась в 1342 г. в местности леучарс, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wemyss, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat в 1371 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat nació en 1342, en Leuchars, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir David Wemyss of Kincaldrum,, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Wemyss, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat en 1371, en Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1380, en Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
